# RedactorLocal

> RedactorLocal is a privacy-first web app that automatically redacts faces in images and video entirely in your browser. No uploads, no cloud — all processing happens client-side.

RedactorLocal lets you drag and drop photos or videos, detects faces with an on-device AI model, and blurs or pixelates them. You can choose the redaction style and select which specific faces to keep visible, then download the redacted image or video.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Upload media, detect and redact faces locally, and download the result.
